languages.text: "Спрашиваешь! Я не просто видел{mf||а} Его, я лично давал{mf||а} Ему советы по управлению Империумом".

traits.locale_text: "Спрашиваешь! Я не просто видел{mf||а} Его, я лично давал{mf||а} Ему советы по управлению Империумом".

languages.text: "Have I? I have not just seen Him, I have personally advised Him on the ruling of the Imperium."
languages.original_text: "Спрашиваешь! Я не просто видел{mf||а} Его, я лично давал{mf||а} Ему советы по управлению Империумом".

traits.locale_text: "Have I? I have not just seen Him, I have personally advised Him on the ruling of the Imperium."
"Have I? I have not just seen Him, I have personally advised Him on the ruling of the Imperium."
"Have I? I have not just seen Him, I have personally advised Him on the ruling of the Imperium."
"Have I? I have not just seen Him, I have personally advised Him on the ruling of the Imperium."
"Have I? I have not just seen Him, I have personally advised Him on the ruling of the Imperium."

languages.text: “亲眼见过？我不仅亲眼见过祂，而且还私下里给祂提过治理帝国的建议。”
languages.original_text: "Have I? I have not just seen Him, I have personally advised Him on the ruling of the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: “亲眼见过？我不仅亲眼见过祂，而且还私下里给祂提过治理帝国的建议。”

languages.text: «¿Que si lo he visto? No solo lo he visto, le he asesorado personalmente sobre la administración del Imperium».
languages.original_text: "Have I? I have not just seen Him, I have personally advised Him on the ruling of the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: «¿Que si lo he visto? No solo lo he visto, le he asesorado personalmente sobre la administración del Imperium».

languages.text: "Gördüm mü? O'nu sadece görmekle kalmadım, İmparatorluk'un idaresi konusunda bizzat kendisine danışmanlık yaptım."
languages.original_text: "Have I? I have not just seen Him, I have personally advised Him on the ruling of the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: "Gördüm mü? O'nu sadece görmekle kalmadım, İmparatorluk'un idaresi konusunda bizzat kendisine danışmanlık yaptım."

languages.text: 「{mf|俺|私}が？陛下に会っただけでなく、帝国の支配について個人的に助言したことがある」
languages.original_text: "Have I? I have not just seen Him, I have personally advised Him on the ruling of the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: 「{mf|俺|私}が？陛下に会っただけでなく、帝国の支配について個人的に助言したことがある」

languages.text: « Vraiment ? Je ne l'ai pas seulement vu, je l'ai personnellement conseillé sur la gestion de l'Imperium. »
languages.original_text: "Have I? I have not just seen Him, I have personally advised Him on the ruling of the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: « Vraiment ? Je ne l'ai pas seulement vu, je l'ai personnellement conseillé sur la gestion de l'Imperium. »

languages.text: "Habe ich das? Ich habe ihn nicht nur gesehen, ich habe ihn persönlich beraten, wie das Imperium zu regieren ist."
languages.original_text: "Have I? I have not just seen Him, I have personally advised Him on the ruling of the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: "Habe ich das? Ich habe ihn nicht nur gesehen, ich habe ihn persönlich beraten, wie das Imperium zu regieren ist."
